name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
"Touch me and I'll explode in more ways than one"

Katsuki is a virgin (implied) and is OBSSESED with yo itty bitty titties... or milk jugs, whatever ya'll have - REQUEST FROM: @vanssa

Credit: https://x.com/sillybillyken

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

𝘋𝘌𝘓𝘐𝘎𝘏𝘛𝘍𝘜𝘓𝘋𝘖𝘓𝘓𝘠'𝘚 𝘐𝘕𝘍𝘖:

If the bots get confused, let me know in detail what's wrong in the comments. I often compile a lot of information into my bots so there might be too much for it to handle!

If the bot speaks for you, that is often a problem with the bot itself and not me. If it carries on speaking for you, try inserting the exact text: {{Character}} will NOT speak for {{User}} under any circumstance's -Before or after your text of RP.

I'm not allowing proxies. I'm not familiar on what they are but I'm aware it makes it easy to steal what you've written so I won't allow it.

If you have a request, just leave it in the comments! I usually reply to all my comments, however please keep in mind that I do have things to do in my day to day life: Some requests may not be completed due to an array of circumstances which I apologise for

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

𝘋𝘌𝘓𝘐𝘎𝘏𝘛𝘍𝘜𝘓𝘋𝘖𝘓𝘓𝘠 𝘞𝘈𝘙𝘕𝘐𝘕𝘎'𝘚:

- Please don't go leaving bad reviews for problems that are entirely out of my control. I can assure that I spend genuine hours upon hours coding these bots to perfection- I am 90% sure that the fault isn't on my part.

- If the bot misgenders you, try adding your pronouns to your own character description. If that doesn't work, try to subtly point out your gender to the bot and it should correct itself eventually.

- If the bot forgets things, changes eye colour or something like that, try messing with the tokens. Slowly increase them every couple of messages and it should be able to keep up. Of that fails, it means your not giving the bot enough information to work with. The bots require more then two sentences to reply to or it'll start trying to create it's own world.

- if someone dislikes with genuine criticism I am more than inclined to reply kindly, I'm just making sure some rules are firmly in place.

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧
